task-1780083299003-8rdi69.description: P0: Build Messages page — wire delivery_log table to dashboard UI. Fetch last 30 messages per user, render MessageCard components with content preview, date, thumbs up/down inline feedback buttons. Replace MessagesComingSoon.tsx.

task-1780083299029-3jtc0e.description: P0: Verify feedback loop end-to-end — daily delivery → Y/N SMS reply → delivery_log update → feedback_weights upsert → AI Readiness Score recalculate → dashboard ScoreRing updates. Fix any silent breaks in the chain.

task-1780083299041-s0heax.description: P0: Add personalized content preview on onboarding — after 5-question flow, before paywall, show a live sample of what their daily message will look like (mock Claude output using their role/industry answers). Must feel real, not generic.

task-1780083299047-rstdcc.description: P1: GitHub Actions CI pipeline — run vitest unit+integration tests on every PR, run Playwright E2E tests on Vercel preview deploy. Block merge if tests fail. Add status badge to README.

task-1780083299057-zenusz.description: P1: Admin delivery health dashboard — show last 24h delivery success/failure counts per channel (email/SMS), last run timestamp of daily-delivery Inngest job, any users with 3+ consecutive failed deliveries. Accessible at /api/admin/delivery-health.

task-1780083299065-qxqx0c.description: P1: Unified dashboard — redesign dashboard home to show both learning tracks in one view: (1) Today's daily message + streak counter at top, (2) Next Clio session card below. One coherent learning journey, not two separate tools.

task-1780083299069-g47nk0.description: P1: Inngest job failure alerting — configure webhook notifications on job failure for daily-delivery, session-content-pipeline, feedback-processor. Send alert to admin email via Resend when any critical job fails 3+ retries.

task-1780083299072-rw59li.description: P2: Mobile responsiveness audit — test all pages and template renderers at 375px (iPhone) and 390px viewports using gstack /qa. ComparisonTable, Timeline, StepFlow, Flowchart must stack vertically on mobile. Fix all layout breaks.

task-1780083299077-7ra0xk.description: P2: KB QA automation — add automated quality rules to kb-qa-agent.ts: word count check (≤80 words), 'So what?' sentence presence, Flesch-Kincaid reading level check. Run QA automatically before marking session content as 'ready'.

task-1780083299081-kv4lmg.description: P2: Brand decision and copy alignment — resolve Distill vs Clio naming. Update all user-facing copy, brief.md, README, and CLAUDE.md to use one consistent brand. Update CLAUDE.md approved library list to include elevenlabs, @11labs/client, googleapis, @xyflow/react, svix.
